text:
is a Shinkalion Z appearing in episode 21 of Shinkansen Henkei Robo Shinkalion Z TV animation series. It is a combination of Shinkalion 500 TYPE EVA and Zailiner μSky TYPE EVA.

Profile

Shinkalion Z 500 μSky TYPE EVA is a bipedal robot whose body is composed of different parts of the 500 TYPE EVA train that is similar to Evangelion Unit-01. There are several characteristic elements of the Evangelion, like the helmet and "collar" of Unit-01. The colors of Unit-01: purple and green with black details are also present.

Shinkalion Z 500 TYPE EVA is 26.5 meters high and weights 122 tons. It is formed by more than four wagons and an aditional wagon in the form of Zailiner μSky TYPE EVA in its left shoulder. Like Unit-01, Shinkalion Z 500 TYPE EVA is able to generate an A.T. Field.

Weapons

μSky Shield is a large shield formed by the facade and a major portion of the roof of the Zailiner μSky TYPE EVA, used mainly on its combination with the Z 500 Type Eva.

Spear of Junctionus https://web.archive.org/web/20210916164456/https://www.shinkalion.com/news/5958/ 

Development

A transformable toy was made by Takara Tomy, under the line Plarail Z Combine: Plarail Shinkalion Z 500 μSky TYPE EVA on 18 December 2021 and re-released on November 2022 for ¥9,350 (tax included). https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gI1001002/
